user.title: Choose how to authenticate
user.description: Most users pick email + password. If your Monarch account is Apple-SSO-only and you don't have a working password, pick the token path.

login.title: Monarch credentials
login.description: Enter your Monarch Money email and password.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Provide your TOTP or email one-time code to finish login.

token.title: Paste Monarch session token
token.description: Open app.monarch.com in a browser, DevTools → Network → any graphql request → copy the value after 'Authorization: Token '. Token only; no prefix, no quotes.

error.unknown: Unexpected error — check Home Assistant logs.
